bug_report.summary: Selecting the Modern theme “Light” preset sets a different default Contrast value than before (-0.40 → ~-0.06)
steps_to_reproduce: Ensure Theme Style is set to “Modern”.
Open the Theme Preset/Color Preset dropdown and select “Light”.
Observe the Contrast numeric field and slider position.
expected_behaviors: Selecting the “Light” preset should apply the preset-defined Contrast default value consistently (as in the previous build, where it was around -0.40).
actual_behaviors: After the change, selecting the “Light” preset results in a much smaller negative Contrast value (around -0.06) and a different slider thumb position compared to before.

false_positive_reasons: Expected GUI difference due to intended code change

bug_report.summary: Project Manager status-bar warning text has reduced contrast/readability (Offline mode message)
steps_to_reproduce: Launch Godot Editor and remain on the Project Manager window (with offline mode enabled so the message appears).
Look at the bottom status-bar message: "Offline mode, update checks disabled."
expected_behaviors: Status/warning text in the Project Manager status bar remains clearly readable with sufficient contrast against its background in the Modern theme.
actual_behaviors: The "Offline mode, update checks disabled." status text appears with noticeably lower contrast against its background, making it harder to read compared to before.

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering

bug_report.summary: Splash screen window title/icon not set when launching project (shows generic icon and title 'Godot')
steps_to_reproduce: In Project Manager, select a project (e.g., “AudioBus_EffectsList_Selection”).
expected_behaviors: Splash/loading window shows the Godot application icon in the titlebar.
Window title includes the project name (e.g., “AudioBus_EffectsList_Selection - Godot Engine”) while loading/opening the project.
actual_behaviors: Titlebar icon is a blank/generic square instead of the Godot icon (diff region no. 0, bbox [0,24,25,51]).
Window title is just “Godot” instead of including the project name (diff region no. 1, bbox [445,28,768,49]).

bug_report.summary: Editor Settings → Interface → Theme: Contrast numeric field appears to use different precision/formatting after code change
steps_to_reproduce: Go to Editor → Editor Settings → Interface → Theme.
Observe the Contrast numeric field (optionally triple-click it to highlight the full value).
expected_behaviors: Contrast numeric field should display a consistent value/precision (same formatting across builds), allowing fine-grained adjustments (e.g., showing 0.55 rather than rounding unexpectedly).
Triple-click should highlight the full numeric value as displayed.
actual_behaviors: Contrast numeric field display/selection differs between builds; in the after-change screenshot the value appears shorter/rounded differently compared to before (indicating changed precision/formatting).
